title: The Gambling Trader
body:
**TGT** introduces a unique **gambling mechanic** through a mysterious new trader known as **"The Joker"**. Players can interact with the Joker to wager any item, with a base 50% chance to double their stake. This chance increases to 75% when under the Luck potion effect.

The Joker spawns naturally in **Dark Forest** biomes. However, be cautious ,if attacked, he instantly transforms into a bat and vanishes.
